violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Larger Cooler holding pre-cut fruit in pre-filled cups not holding proper temperature. Lower level of cups- 42F. Upper level of cups 48F. Ice was melted. Need more ice.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwashing sink blocked by skewered food in a box making accessibility difficult. Owner washing hands in 3-comp sink.
